narrative:
Valley Township has 1,503 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
